name: Topsort
description: Send events server-side to the Topsort Events API.

api_key.description: Created under Settings > API Integration in the Topsort Manager Platform.
api_key.label: API Key

skipZeroPricePurchases.description: When enabled, purchase events with items that have zero or missing unit price will be filtered out.
skipZeroPricePurchases.label: Skip Zero Price Purchases

actions.name: Click
actions.description: Send click events to Topsort when a consumer has clicked on a promotable.

fields.label: Event ID
fields.description: Unique ID generated by the client to suppress duplicate events. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

id.title: Event ID
id.description: Unique ID generated by the client to suppress duplicate events. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Occurred At
fields.description: Timestamp that the event happened at.

occurredAt.title: Occurred At
occurredAt.description: Timestamp that the event happened at.

fields.label: Opaque User ID
fields.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

opaqueUserId.title: Opaque User ID
opaqueUserId.description: Identifier for tracking users regardless of sign-in status. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Resolved Bid ID
fields.description: Identifier of an instance of a resolved auction for a determined product. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

resolvedBidId.title: Resolved Bid ID
resolvedBidId.description: Identifier of an instance of a resolved auction for a determined product. The length should not exceed 128 characters.

fields.label: Additional Attribution
fields.description: Additional attribution information.

fields.label: External Vendor ID
fields.description: Marketplace provided ID for a vendor.

externalVendorId.title: External Vendor ID
externalVendorId.description: Marketplace provided ID for a vendor.

fields.label: Entity
fields.description: Entity is meant for reporting organic events, not sponsored or promoted products. It refers to the object involved in the organic interaction. If resolvedBidId has any value, entity will be disregarded.

entity.title: Entity
entity.description: Entity is meant for reporting organic events, not sponsored or promoted products. It refers to the object involved in the organic interaction. If resolvedBidId has any value, entity will be disregarded.

id.title: Entity ID
id.description: The marketplace's ID of the entity associated with the interaction.

type.title: Entity Type
type.description: The type of entity associated with the interaction.

fields.label: Placement
fields.description: Placement information for the impression.

path.title: Path
path.description: URL path of the page triggering the event. For web apps, this can be obtained in JS using window.location.pathname.

position.title: Position
position.description: Index of the item within a list (e.g., search results, similar products).

page.title: Page Number
page.description: For paginated pages, this indicates which page number triggered the event.

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: For paginated pages, this indicates how many items are in each result page.

productId.title: Product ID
productId.description: The ID of the product associated to the page in which this event occurred. This ID must match the ID provided through the catalog service.

categoryIds.title: Category IDs
categoryIds.description: An array of IDs of the categories associated to the page in which this event occurred. These IDs must match the IDs provided through the catalog service.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: The search string provided by the user. This must match the searchQuery field provided in the auction request.

fields.label: Page
fields.description: Page information for the impression.

value.title: Page Value
value.description: Detail of the page, depending on the type.

fields.label: Object
fields.description: Information regarding an organic or non-sponsored event.

object.title: Object
object.description: Information regarding an organic or non-sponsored event.

type.title: Object Type
type.description: The type of object that is being reported on the interaction.

assetId.title: Asset ID
assetId.description: When type is banner, signals the ID of the asset of the banner.

clickType.title: Click Type
clickType.description: When type is listing, signals the specific interaction flavor with the listing.

fields.label: External Campaign ID
fields.description: Marketplace provided ID for a campaign.

externalCampaignId.title: External Campaign ID
externalCampaignId.description: Marketplace provided ID for a campaign.

fields.label: Device Type
fields.description: The device the user is on.

deviceType.title: Device Type
deviceType.description: The device the user is on.

fields.label: Channel
fields.description: The channel where the event occurred.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: The channel where the event occurred.
